name: London Prime
description:
Not Very "Primery" Of A London...

...

Valen's special for my boy!...

Also, I know bro was meant to be based off Minus, but they didn't have to copy it that blatantly. I could just take a grain of Minus prime and still capture London's personality perfectly. What is this shit (I KNOW IT'S A JOKE, DON'T KILL ME TO DOMAINS)

I've never seen London in-game, so if his personality different or sum' like that, feedback... Added a second intel for fun

Have you ever imagined being a grey-skinned soldier who's trying to fight for their life but this mf pops up out of a corner 10 away from you and bursts a LOAD OF electrical force on your arse from their templer?

here's 2 images I grudged off from the goog.

There's NO , NO romantism, NO script, NO flirting, NO tease and ABOSLUTELY NO sneeks.
